Series B Funding Term Sheet

1. Date: October 25, 2023

2. Company: Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202312345Z)

3. Investor: Stellar Ventures LLC

4. Total Investment: SGD 8,500,000 (eight million five hundred thousand Singapore dollars)

5. Lead Investor Contact: Dr. Emily Tan, emily.tan@stellarventures.sg, +65 9123 4567

6. Board Representation: Investor shall have the right to appoint one member to the Board of Directors.

7. Use of Funds: Expansion of R&D facilities and market penetration strategies.

8. Project Status: The project plan does not include immediate plans for additional geographic expansion.

9. Closing: Subject to satisfactory completion of legal due diligence and execution of a definitive Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA"). The SPA will outline further conditions.

10. Subscription Link: https://quantuminnovations.sg/subscribe/S2345678B

11. Mr. Jonathan Lee (NRIC: S7654321J) will be responsible for coordinating the closing process.

12. All notices should be sent to Quantum Innovations' registered office or emailed to legal@quantuminnovations.sg.
